title: SMART READING - 211info
text: SMART READING ROGUE VALLEY AREA SMART READING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Recruits volunteers to read with children, fostering a love of reading and providing books for children to keep and add to their personal libraries. The North Coast Team is based out of SMART's main office in Portland, but staff regularly visis the areas covered by this team. 824 E Jackson Street Suite C Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Literacy program participants: Ages 5-10 (Pre-K through grade 3) Volunteers: Must undergo a national criminal background check Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 734-5628 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 734-5628 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information. Volunteer applications available online. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties Services: Literacy Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
